title: Patient Safety Comments Topic Analyzer

shortDescription: A program that uses AI to analyze an excel file containing comments written in Spanish, and producing the most mentioned topics from those comments.

title: PhishEye
legacyTitle: Cybersecurity: PhishEye
shortDescription: PhishEye is a Chrome web extension designed to detect suspicious activity, whether it is phishing emails or unsafe browsing. The system analyzes certain information like embedded links, suspicious keywords, domain names, and sender URL to identify potential threats before users engage with malicious content.

title: Campus Assistant
legacyTitle: Computer Science: Campus Assistant

title: Computer Science: Mood-Based Playlist Recommender
legacyTitle: Computer Science: Mood-Based Playlist Recommender
shortDescription: Moodify is a full-stack web application that solves the challenge of manual playlist compilation for students. It uses a Natural Language Processing (NLP) algorithm to instantly interpret a user's mood, whether selected or described in text, and delivers curated Spotify playlist recommendations. The system is built on React, Node.js/Express, and integrates securely with the Spotify API.

title: Profiling Ransomware Attacks via Web Crawling and Textual Analysis
legacyTitle: Cybersecurity: Profiling Ransomware Attacks via Web Crawling and Textual Analysis
shortDescription: Analyzing the content from ransomware-related news, posts, and reports can provide heuristics for the defense. Profiling the characteristics of emerging ransomware attacks can inform a more effective ransomware defense.

title: Cloud Based Resume Builder
legacyTitle: Information Technology: Cloud-Based Resume Builder
shortDescription: Cloud-Based Resume Builder is a Django web app that lets anyone craft, preview, and export a polished resume without touching HTML. It provides guided forms for experience, education, projects, and skills; live preview; WeasyPrint PDF export; and a clean Tailwind UI. Deployed on AWS Lightsail with Gunicorn/Apache and Let’s Encrypt HTTPS.

title: AutoSec - Automated Network Configuration
legacyTitle: Information Technology: Automated Network Configuration for IT Environements
shortDescription: Many individuals who rely on multiple internet devices will eventually need to deal with configuring their network infrastructure, whether at home, in a small business, or larger company environment. This task can quickly become overwhelming for those ranging from little to no technical expertise to experienced professionals. AutoSec was designed and created to relieve this burden by streamlining configuration tasks while offering a beginner-friendly approach to setting up routers, switches, and automated network environments. Consistent and reliable configurations can be deployed with minimal effort, playing an important role in reducing complexity and improving the overall management of network infrastructure.
productOwners: Product Owner: Cecil Mais Mentor: Masoud Sdjadi

title: Green Vault

The platform ingests a user’s trade, retrieves relevant market data, computes execution metrics like slippage and spreads, and stores results through a structured backend designed for secure authentication, validation, and data management.

title: Lock and Key – Encrypted Password Management and Collaboration System
legacyTitle: Cybersecurity: Lock and Key: Encrypted Password Management and Collaboration System
shortDescription: Lock & Key gives users a secure place to keep all their login details. They can create an account, set passwords, and retrieve them quickly. At the same time, the system handles the heavy encryption work in the background, including safeguards built to withstand future advances in computing.

title: CyberSense : Training Simulator for Cyber Security Employee

title: Stress and Anxiety Management Application
legacyTitle: Computer Science: Stress and anxiety management app
shortDescription: The team developed a cross-platform stress and anxiety management application called HowRu.life. The existing Android app was modernized using Jetpack Compose to improve maintainability, usability, and scalability. In parallel, the team created a new iOS prototype in Flutter, implementing core features such as self-reflection prompts, guided breathing exercises, a mood tracker, and a local SQLite-based database. Both versions focus on delivering a calming, user-friendly experience using reusable UI components and a consistent design chosen by the product owner. The Android app was fully tested and deployed to the Google Play Store, while the iOS version remains a functional prototype. The project concludes with recommendations for improving testing, privacy compliance, and preparing the iOS app for App Store release.

title: Secured Med

title: Framing By Design

shortDescription: An edutainment game designed to teach players problem solving skills and empathetic conversation strategies

title: Secure AI Race Strategy (SARS)
legacyTitle: Cybersecurity: AI Race Strategist
shortDescription: This project created two models, an AI-driven race strategy model and a spoofing protection unit to mitigate any spoofing/data manipulation attacks that could have led the AI model to produce unsafe suggestions. This model highlights the need for vehicle safety.

title: Context-Aware Conversation Support with Augmented Reality and Generative AI
legacyTitle: Computer Science: Context-Aware Conversation Support with Augmented Reality and Generative AI
shortDescription: Effective and smooth conversations rely on strong social skills and background knowledges. However, gaps in knowledge among participants often disrupt the flow of conversation. For example, a conversational participant might struggle to engage in an effective conversation about planning a trip to Miami if they have never visited before. Recent advances in Generative AI (GenAI) have shown promising capabilities in generating information, while head-mounted Augmented Reality (AR) offers the potential to render and visualize information anywhere in the field of view. However, it remains unclear how GenAI and AR can synergistically support conversations. The overarching goal of this project is to explore the design of an AR-based conversational supporting tools. Ultimately, while wearing the head-mounted AR, useful information should be rendered with right level of details, at the right time and right place in front of the conversational participants.

title: MyMedCab - Medication Management System
legacyTitle: Computer Science: MyMedCab - Medication Management System
shortDescription: A medication management system in the form of a web application that allows users to manage their medications as prescribed to them by their physicians. Users are able to click on a certain medication that they desire and information is displayed such as the dosage, the type of medication, and refill date. Additionally, when a user clicks on a medication, we have a map interface that updates to a respective pharmacy and shows the stock level. Physicians are able to prescribe medications to a patient as well as edit any existing medications, and they are also provided access to a map where they can view the stock level and the pharmacies.

title: AI Mock Interview Prep
legacyTitle: Information Technology: AI Mock Interview Prep
shortDescription: The AI Mock Interview Prep app is a tool that helps students practice for job interviews. It asks interview questions just like a real interview would. Users can answer by typing or speaking. The app gives feedback based on their answers and helps them see what they did well and what they can improve. It is made to help users feel more confident and prepared for real interviews.

title: Computer Equipment Checkout Tracker
legacyTitle: Information Technology: Computer Equipment Checkout Tracker
shortDescription: Our project aims to streamline the process of checking out electronic devices utilizing a centralized database for educators and students. Educators are able to easily add and remove devices, see timestamps of when a device is checked out/returned, and be able to see who has the device. Students are able to utilize their school credentials to log in to see which devices are available and see what devices they currently have checked out and return them.
productOwners: Product Owner: Jayden Sandoval. Mentor: N/A

title: Gamified Habit Tracker
legacyTitle: Computer Science: Gamified Habit Tracker: Leveling Up Everyday Routines
shortDescription: The Gamified Habit Tracker turns real-world habit building into an engaging role-playing game experience where users complete personal quests across health, learning, creativity, and social growth. As users stay consistent, they earn rewards, level up, unlock achievements, and progress through an endless challenge mode where long-term dedication determines how far they advance through increasingly difficult stages. By transforming daily routines into visible progress and meaningful rewards, the system promotes accountability, long-term motivation, and sustainable personal growth.

title: Computer Science: Loan Validation
legacyTitle: Computer Science: Loan Validation
shortDescription: Our project is an automated loan-application validation system that processes applicant documents, extracts key financial information using OCR and AI models, and generates a risk score. The system includes a frontend interface for uploading documents, a FastAPI backend for managing applicants and storing extracted data, and an AI pipeline that analyzes PDFs pulled from the client’s S3 bucket. The final output provides structured fields, document validation results, and a risk assessment for each applicant.

title: AI Medical Diagnosis Assistant
legacyTitle: Computer Science: AI Medical Diagnosis Assistant
shortDescription: AI-powered medical diagnostic platform that analyzes clinical symptoms (HPO) and genetic variant data (VCF) to infer likely diseases. Built with a synthetic biomedical dataset, KB-driven symptom ontologies, and ML classifiers trained on combined phenotype-genotype features.

title: Christian Pereira

title: TapIn MMA

title: SpineWise
legacyTitle: Computer Science: SpineWise
shortDescription: SpineWise is a desktop application for Windows 10/11, macOS Sonoma, and Linux built in Python and operating off of OpenCV, MediaPipe, and PyQt5. It is a lightweight desktop application made for monitoring a user's posture in the background through OpenCV actively, using MediaPipe landmarks to determine the quality of a user's posture. This generates analytics for the user to reflect upon, recommended exercises and products to buy for posture health, and can alert the user immediately when poor posture is held.

title: AI- Driven Warehouse Stock Management
legacyTitle: Computer Science: AI-Driven Warehouse Stock Management
shortDescription: The AI Driven Warehouse Stock Management platform was created to establish the foundation for an intelligent inventory balancing system. The solution integrates a persistent operational database, a scalable backend, and an interactive dashboard that shows inventory conditions across multiple warehouses. Unlike static systems, it is designed to evolve into an agent-driven platform that continuously monitors stock levels, forecasts demand and recommends transfers with high accuracy.

It streamlines embedded development by shifting it from trial-and-error to guided, context-aware automation.

Customers can book online, and the system avoids conflicts, sends reminders by email/text, and syncs with Google Calendar. Why it works: Businesses hate missed appointments and double bookings. This solves that problem directly. Deliverables: Booking system, conflict detection, reminders, manager dashboard.

shortDescription: It’s an FIU-exclusive social platform that centralizes student life into one place. Students can sign up, create profiles, follow classmates and organizations, see a personalized feed of posts and events, and join orgs directly. Doing all of this in one app instead of jumping between Instagram, PantherConnect, Discord, and email. The app also includes an FIU-trained RAG chatbot that answers campus-specific questions using real FIU information.

title: Watchmen Route Over a Body of Water

shortDescription: A system designed to help lake patrol agencies determine the most efficient patrol routes through lakes containing obstacles such as islands, landmasses, or restricted areas. This project models the lake as a polygon with interior holes and generates an optimized traversal path inspired by the classical Watchman Route Problem.

title: SHE<CODES/>
legacyTitle: Computer Science: SHE<Codes/> - Inspiring Young Women and Queer Youth in STEM
shortDescription: SHE<Codes/> is a narrative coding game designed to inspire young women and queer youth to explore careers in computer science and STEM. Instead of traditional tutorials, the game introduces programming concepts through interactive stories with historical pioneers such as Ada Lovelace, Grace Hopper, Alan Turing, and Katherine Johnson. The goal is to make coding feel empowering, inclusive, and creative while applying software engineering fundamentals and computer science theory to be able to reflect back on all the contributions made by these pioneers.
